scripts.env:hard-setup: bun run supabase:stop && bun run supabase:start && bun run supabase:db:reset
scripts.serve:worktree: bun run supabase:with-env -- bun -e "const supabaseUrl = process.env.SUPABASE_URL || ''; process.env.SUPA_URL = supabaseUrl; process.env.SUPA_ANON = process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || ''; process.env.API_DOMAIN = supabaseUrl.replace(/^https?:\/\//, '') + '/functions/v1'; process.env.ENV = 'local'; const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync('bun', ['run', 'serve:local'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
scripts.backend: bun run supabase:start && bun run supabase:functions:serve
scripts.cli:check: bun run cli:lint && bun run cli:typecheck && bun run cli:build && bun run cli:test
scripts.test:coverage:all: bun run cli:build && bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run --coverage.enabled=true tests/*
scripts.test:all: bun run cli:build && bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run tests/*
scripts.test:updates: bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run tests/updates*
scripts.test:backend: bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run --exclude=tests/cli*
scripts.test:plugin: bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run tests/updates*.test.ts tests/stats*.test.ts tests/channel_self*.test.ts
scripts.test:api: bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run --exclude=tests/cli* --exclude=tests/updates* --exclude=tests/stats* --exclude=tests/channel_self*
scripts.test:channel_devices: bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run tests/channel_devices/*.test.ts
scripts.test:cli: bun run cli:build && bun run supabase:with-env -- bunx vitest run tests/cli*
scripts.test:cloudflare:plugin: USE_CLOUDFLARE_WORKERS=true vitest run tests/updates*.test.ts tests/stats*.test.ts tests/channel_self*.test.ts --config vitest.config.cloudflare-plugin.ts
scripts.fmt: bun run lint:fix && bun run lint:sql
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:prod: bun run deploy:cloudflare:api:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:files:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugins:prod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:preprod: bun run deploy:cloudflare:api:preprod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:files:preprod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin:preprod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:plugins:prod: bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_as:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_na:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_eu:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_af:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_oc:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_sa:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_me:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_hk:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare:plugin_jp:prod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:api:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/api/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:api:preprod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.preprod --config cloudflare_workers/api/wrangler.jsonc --env=preprod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:api:dev: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.alpha --config cloudflare_workers/api/wrangler.jsonc --env=alpha
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:files:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/files/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:files:preprod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.preprod --config cloudflare_workers/files/wrangler.jsonc --env=preprod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:files:dev: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.alpha  --config cloudflare_workers/files/wrangler.jsonc --env=alpha
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin:preprod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.preprod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=preprod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin:dev: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.alpha --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=alpha
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugins:prod: bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_as:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_na:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_eu:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_af:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_oc:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_sa:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_me:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_hk:prod && bun run deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_jp:prod
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_as:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_as
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_na:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_na
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_eu:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_eu
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_af:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_af
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_oc:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_oc
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_sa:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_sa
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_me:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_me
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_hk:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_hk
scripts.deploy:cloudflare_env:plugin_jp:prod: bunx wrangler secret bulk internal/cloudflare/.env.prod --config cloudflare_workers/plugin/wrangler.jsonc --env=prod_jp
scripts.deploy:supabase_env:prod: bunx supabase secrets set --project-ref xvwzpoazmxkqosrdewyv --env-file internal/cloudflare/.env.prod
scripts.deploy:supabase_env:preprod: bunx supabase secrets set --project-ref aucsybvnhavogdmzwtcw --env-file internal/cloudflare/.env.preprod
scripts.deploy:supabase_env:dev: bunx supabase secrets set --project-ref aucsybvnhavogdmzwtcw --env-file internal/cloudflare/.env.alpha
